comments: Tommy has been in Germany for a couple of days.

sessions.details: Recorded 1967-09-25 (Peel Session #1). First TX on Top Gear 1967-10-01. No known commercial release (but several unofficial ones).

Recorded 1968-06-25 (Peel Session #3). First TX on Top Gear 1968-08-11. No known commercial release (but several unofficial ones). TV: "Rescued from oblivion by somebody (Mike Cowley) with sharp ears."
Recorded 1981-02-18. First TX 20 March 1981. 'Dance To The Music' available on The Friday Rock Show (BBC).

track_listing.details: LP-Quit Dreaming And Get On The Beam; Mercury
A Saucerful Of Secrets; Peel Session #3
